nodes.name: LC

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The Humaita antbird (Myrmelastes humaythae) is a species of passerine bird in subfamily Thamnophilinae of family Thamnophilidae, the "typical antbirds". It is found in Brazil, Bolivia, and Peru.Remsen, J

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The Humaita antbird is found in western Amazonian Brazil, the eastern part of the Department of Madre de Dios in southeastern Peru, and in Pando Department in far northern Bolivia
